title: Amtech I0361 Socket Set 3/8”, 12pc Chrome Vanadium Steel Metric Wrench Kit, 45 Tooth Ratchet Pack with Quick Release
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: The Amtech ratchet handle and sockets benefit from a durable chrome vanadium steel construction for added reliability.
Features a 45 tooth ratchet with quick release function, allowing for rapid socket change.
This Socket wrench set is also supplied with a handy storage rail to keep your ratchet and sockets both secure, and organised.
Amtech’s Socket Wrench Set 3/8” contains all the most frequently used sizes for convenience.

The 6 point 10-22mm 3/8” metric sockets: 10-11-12-13-14-15-16-17-19- 22mm are ideal for a wide variety of tasks around the home or garage, and the 1PC 3/8" to 5" (125mm) extension bar allows you to work on those hard to reach areas.
description: Product Description The Amtech 12 piece metric socket set is an ideal ratchet set for a variety of tasks around the home or garage. Reliably constructed using durable chrome vanadium steel and also features a 45 tooth ratchet with quick release button. All the most frequently used sizes are included, along with a useful storage rail to keep you organised and ready for any automotive or DIY tasks. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
